---
title: "Sourangshu Pal"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  max-items: 6
  categories: true
---

## AI, Machine Learning & Modern Tech

Writing about production AI systems — RAG pipelines, LLMs, vector search, and the engineering details that matter.

---
